title: ASR Outdoor Full Tang Serrated Stainless Steel Dive Knife with Leg Holster
description:
This Dive Knife is an ideal tool for bringing along dives or other dangerous underwater activities. It features a sharp tip for ultimate slicing capability and serrated edge, great whether you're warding off a big fish or cutting yourself loose from a tangle. Measuring at just 9" long, this knife will come in handy in just about any high-pressure situation. It comes with a durable black sheath with a quick release button for reliability. In addition you'll also find convenient fully adjustable leg holster straps constructed of a durable rubber. The full tang design of this blade ensures that you wont ever have to worry about cleaning it thoroughly! It's all one piece, so no removal of a handle is necessary

ASR Outdoor Full Tang Serrated Stainless Steel Dive Knife with Leg Holster

This Dive Knife is an ideal tool for bringing along dives or other dangerous underwater activities. It features a sharp tip for ultimate slicing capability and serrated edge, great whether you're warding off a big fish or cutting yourself loose from a tangle.

Key Features

  • Overall Length: 9"
  • Blade Length: 4"
  • Sheath Length: 7"
  • 2 pc Holster Straps: 20" L Each
  • Material: Stainless Steel

Product Specifications

  • MPN: SSTD-232
  • UPC: 674198281581
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: 9 in

Measuring at just 9" long, this knife will come in handy in just about any high-pressure situation. It comes with a durable black sheath with a quick release button for reliability. In addition you'll also find convenient fully adjustable leg holster straps constructed of a durable rubber.

The full tang design of this blade ensures that you wont ever have to worry about cleaning it thoroughly! It's all one piece, so no removal of a handle is necessary.

Make sure to keep one of these on you at all times underwater! They also make great additions to car or boat emergency kits.
